channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Monthly)

item.title: 📝 DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp (891 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: DeusData

📝 Repository: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp

📄 Descrizione: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 64 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

⭐ Stelle: 891

🍴 Forks: 106

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: aider c claude-code code-analysis code-intelligence codex cursor developer-tools gemini-cli graph-visualization kilocode knowledge-graph mcp mcp-server model-context-protocol opencode performance sqlite tree-sitter windsurf

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-24T22:01:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-25T03:59:03Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 soufianekhiat/qaws (82 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: soufianekhiat

📝 Repository: soufianekhiat/qaws

📄 Descrizione: A dependency-free C11 library for creating, evaluating, sampling, traversing, and inspecting parametric curves and surfaces in 2D and 3D. One source, four backends: C, HLSL, GLSL, Halide

⭐ Stelle: 82

item.title: 📝 Midrags/SFF (67 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Midrags

📝 Repository: Midrags/SFF

📄 Descrizione: Open-source SteamForge Fetcher (SFF): A tool to set up games for Steam using Lua scripts, manifests, and GreenLuma. Enables DLC unlocking, multiplayer fixes, and Steam patching without cracking Steam. Features parallel downloads, backups, and more. Modified from original SMD by jericjan. Use at your own risk.

⭐ Stelle: 67

🍴 Forks: 3

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-22T20:12:14Z
